Title: The Anderson Performance Polo
Body (HTML): Our signature polo, built for 18 holes and everything after. Four-way stretch fabric with moisture-wicking technology moves with your swing and keeps you dry. UPF 50+ protection, tailored fit, and a self-collar that stays crisp all day. The polo that started it all.
Image Alt Text: The Anderson Performance Polo in Navy

Title: The Sullivan Quarter-Zip
Body (HTML): Lightweight enough for a sunrise tee time, polished enough for post-round drinks. Brushed interior with a heathered exterior that pairs with everything in your closet. Moisture-wicking performance fabric with a quarter-zip that lets you dial in your comfort.

Title: The Crawford 5-Pocket Pant
Body (HTML): Technical performance meets clean tailoring. Hidden stretch waistband moves with your swing while water-resistant finish sheds morning dew. Five-pocket styling with a modern slim taper that looks sharp from the first tee to the nineteenth hole.

Title: The Maxwell Performance Short
Body (HTML): 9-inch inseam with quick-dry, moisture-managing fabric built for warm rounds. Hidden phone pocket keeps your scorecard app close. Lightweight, breathable, and sharp enough that nobody will know these are technical shorts.
